flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Morris College are 28% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($30.6k vs $42.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Morris College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (24.9% → 17.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Morris College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (8.0% → 6.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Morris College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (48.5% → 41.3%).
